explanation: Inserted quotes around the encoded command to test if the rule is affected by string quoting.
Substituted '-WindowStyle' with its short form '-w' to test if the rule is affected by option abbreviation.
Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the rule is affected by argument order.
Omitted the '-WindowStyle Hidden' parameter to test if the rule is affected by the absence of this parameter.
Replaced the encoded command with an environment variable to test if the rule is affected by variable substitution.
